0:
Vuyargur has a task for you that he cannot delegate.

※Please note that the difficulty of this quest has been synced to your current level. Furthermore, you may not proceed with a class or job that is different from when you accepted this quest.

24: Deliver the Chirwagur payment to the charitable Chirwagur in Solace.

25: Deliver the Chirwagur salt to Vuyargur.

48: Salt is vital to our operations—both to grit icy paths and preserve food—and it is high time that we replenished our stocks. Unfortunately, we have encountered a minor issue...

49: Our Chirwagur supplier has requested you by name. Would you be willing to complete the trade in our stead?

50: My thanks. You should find him to the northwest of Worlar's Echo. All you need do is hand over this talisman in exchange for the salt. And...stay on your guard.

51: It is you—good. I waited. We trade salt for talisman.

52: Talisman will be buried in saltern. Even greater divine blessing.

53: Do you...remember me? I was with Vorporlor. Traded crystal with Nopli. Now, we meet again.

54: You go to snow mountain with Yok Huy. Why?

55: How is work on snow mountain?

56: You are strange. <chuckle> Always involve self. Always interesting stories.

57: My kin will not meet outsiders. But you are interesting. To you, I will trade the divine blessing.

58: Here. Salt. Let us trade again. The divine blessing for your stories.

59: Ah, you are returned! Did the trade go as planned?

60: My thanks. Chirwagur salt is the finest around, but they bear us a great deal of hostility. Negotiations are often a fraught affair...

61: Though it seems they have placed their trust in you, <Split(<Highlight>ObjectParameter(1)</Highlight>, ,1)/>. I hope I can count on your diplomatic dealings should they request your presence again!
